name: Trident Brands Incorporated
summary: Trident Brands Incorporated, together with its subsidiaries, focuses on developing branded and private label consumer products and ingredients in the United States and Canada. The company offers branded consumer products in the functional nutrition and dietary supplement categories under the Brain Armor and P2N Peak Performance Nutrition brands, as well as private label sports nutrition items to various retailers. The company also holds various banking facilities. The company was formerly known as Sandfield Ventures Corp. and changed its name to Trident Brands Incorporated in July 2013. Trident Brands Incorporated was founded in 2007 and is based in Brookfield, Wisconsin.
